noi: Yad2 Cars isn't just a used-car listing surface. It's a real-time Israeli automotive market intelligence layer. Every listing, price change, ownership count, mileage reading, and days-on-market trace is a signal about household purchasing power, seller urgency, and local economic sentiment before official indices can see it.
shipcheck_notes: Official Printing Press scorecard reached Grade A at 88/100.
Yad2 live smoke test succeeds without cookies for read-only listing search and sync.
AutoTrader IL support was removed because the public site does not expose a usable used-car listing catalogue.
